birdsarentreal

auth.routes

Authentication routes: registration, login, logout, and admin user creation.

All routes in this module are registered on the ‘auth’ blueprint and are accessible under the /auth URL prefix.

Functions

register()

Handle student self-registration (GET and POST).

login()

Handle user login for all roles (GET and POST).

logout()

Clear the session and redirect to the login page.

sys_admin_register()

Allow a system administrator to create a new user account (GET and POST).

Module Contents

auth.routes.register()[source]

Handle student self-registration (GET and POST).

GET: Render the registration form. POST: Validate form data, hash the password, insert a new user row

(role=3), a matching stud_type row, and an address row inside a single transaction. Redirect to login on success; flash an error if the email is already taken.

auth.routes.login()[source]

Handle user login for all roles (GET and POST).

GET: Render the login form. POST: Look up the user by email, verify the bcrypt password hash, and

populate the session with user_id, email, and role on success. Flash an error and re-render the form on failure.

auth.routes.logout()[source]

Clear the session and redirect to the login page.

auth.routes.sys_admin_register()[source]

Allow a system administrator to create a new user account (GET and POST).

GET: Render the admin user-creation form. POST: Validate the selected role (GS=1, Faculty=2, Student=3), hash the

password, and insert the user. For student accounts, also insert a stud_type row. Always inserts an address row. Redirects to the user list on success; flashes errors for duplicate email or invalid role.

Requires: system_admin role.
